content: WhatsApp CRM Chrome extensions (WAPlus, Lion CRM, noCRM, Eazybe, Chat Quotient): common feature set = side panel layered over WhatsApp Web with contact/CRM shortcuts, labels/tabs, kanban, templates/quick replies, scheduling, auto-reply, follow-up funnels, bulk messaging, chatbot flow builders, AI bot integrations (ChatGPT/Gemini), translate, privacy blur, webhooks/API, CRM sync (HubSpot/Salesforce/Zoho). Table stakes for the category: works inside WhatsApp Web without API setup, per-chat context panel, quick replies, notes.
